he4744700g04beg4d1egafbfg0a99f3b7c356: Who the hells? Get over here and help!
hb92dd181g0276g4366g99d6g803fd0557064: If we don't deal with them gnolls, none of us are getting out of here alive.
hc65a9493g1330g4a7cgb4e5g519c8aede055: Your Zhentarim friends sent me to retrieve the cargo
h554c40f1gd1cbg4ac1g96fdg7feccb5cec6a: You're working for Zarys? Didn't expect that black-hearted vixen to send help. Bloody grateful, mind.
hf16fb5fbg3ff7g4040gb314g96e1beea9cf2: I'm here for the cargo - rescuing you isn't part of the plan.
h3c969a3dge62eg4b4fgaa82g46e673bacb01: I know me and the boy are expendable. Comes with the job. But we can fight - no sense in leaving us behind.
h6e369279gfe5bg44bbg8a35g7da0d1125e03: Right you are. If we get out of this, I owe you.
h10ae3ef6g106eg4f73g9733g3c8297f3e4c7: You'll only get in the way.
hdb26f622g5a88g4ff1g9f74g3e0ac9f0226e: We can handle ourselves - they got the drop on us before, but it's time for payback.
hf827198eg1c54g4790ga658ged690dc55d0c: You misunderstand. I'm not going to leave you behind - I'm going to kill you.
h37bb383dg31c4g4ff6g8b6bgdf1fffb07f2e: Bloody fool. I hope those monsters tear you to shreds!
h3ca13409g3899g400cg8745g5c2b8cd992f6: I know I'm expendable. Comes with the job. But I can fight - no sense in leaving me behind.
h1a10fad3g5695g4dcegb115g92cbf6efe512: You'll only get in the way.
h20efbad6gd888g44abga10cg5c6e4806e1d3: I can handle myself. They got the drop on us before, but it's time for payback.
he1048228g3e75g4598g9c3eg37055bbce4ac: You misunderstand. I'm not going to leave you behind - I'm going to kill you.
h363b3d51gaabcg4b6ag88f1g1e11f6c8b790: Thanks. Me and the boy will do what we can to help - we've still got some fight in us.
hddf6ec14g9cb4g45a4g932agb6cc54bc4218: There's another way out - follow me.
hc2afd4a4g2d35g4844gbe4ag0f0e9dfad305: Across the chasm? You might have got in that way, but you're stuck with us now.
h297b5cbbg9955g4397g912cgc44570657462: Half-devil you might be, but I don't see any wings.
h7d987ed6g4620g4dd0g9cc9gcac2ecb29c8c: Hold the line while I prepare for the fight.
hde97d486gd74dg42c0g907dga2246820d86e: Aye, that we can do. The fire won't hold them forever though. Be quick about it.
h916d7493gb664g4369gb1acg5e53a13df3d9: When the fighting starts, we'll be right alongside you.
h8ae05e31g365fg4af7gb792g14459a230c59: There's another way out - follow me.
h91e9c8d9gde44g4b52g9c97gd483ce4e7996: All right. Hold the line while I prepare for battle.
h6ed23daeg4a9cg4ca4gbcb6gd0bc4e5aa6f0: One of us getting out of here richer - I don't fight for free.
h6f9db435g3fc3g480agb4d9gf750ff299f3c: Fine. Money's useless to dead men.
h4996548cg0bd8g4bd0g8432g20397f488a0e: Damn it... must have dropped my purse.
h316a417fgda42g459agac02g13eb99396a88: Get us out of this, and I swear we'll make it worth your while.
h02a3c607ge126g4172g86f6gd56297e07048: There, you are fairly bought and paid for. Let's take them!
hc1b9d9c4gade8g4e92gb196gb978f93edd32: Counter-offer. You fight with us, or you die with us.
h079bf60cgb3b5g45aag93d8gce629962f0f7: Come and get us, you hairy bastards!
ha17bfb85g1621g43aag923egb4312d4431e7: Can't say I wouldn't do the same - but if we're dying here, you're dying with us!
hd4f9a156g729dg4e53g9297gd89e2874b1c7: There's nothing in there that'll help - leave it!
h2a79c14cgd846g4b7eg8119gdb7931cc60cb: We need to deal with those beasts now. They're hungry enough to brave the fire.
h78e29136g6694g47f7gbb67g1a0036769cd9: I still need more time to prepare.
h43428336gcbf9g4d91g99fegf5822d1d1541: If you're here to help, get to the fight quickly!
